definition: A careful examination of a product, machine or process to check its condition or quality.

sentences.text: The operator performed a visual _____ before starting the production line.
The quality _____ found a small crack on the welded part.
After the _____ was completed, production continued without any problems.

definition: Work performed to keep equipment in good condition and prevent or repair failures.

sentences.text: The _____ team replaced the damaged proximity sensor.
Preventive _____ helps reduce unexpected machine failures.
The robot was stopped for scheduled _____ during the night shift.

definition: The amount of light produced by or reflected from a surface, screen or image.

sentences.text: The camera _____ was increased to make the part easier to detect.
Incorrect _____ settings can cause unreliable inspection results.
The operator adjusted the screen _____ before checking the image.

definition: The straight-line distance across the center of a circle or cylindrical object.

sentences.text: The operator measured the _____ of the shaft with a digital caliper.
The hole _____ must remain within the specified tolerance.
A larger pipe _____ allows more material to flow through the system.

definition: To continue giving someone the latest information about a situation or process.

sentences.text: Please _____ if the meeting time changes.
Can you _____ while I am away?
